titleStmt.title: SII 22.74: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 74. (A.R. No. 74 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KŌN. TRIBH. KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA—10th YEAR.

summary.p: This registers a gift of 3(1/2) vēli of wet land and 3 vēli and odd of dry land taxfree in the village Naralōka-dīraṉpaṭṭu in Meykuṉṟa-nāḍu on the southern bank, by the king for the expenses of worship and offerings during the service Kulaśēkharan-Śanḍi in the temple of Tāntōṉṟi-Āḷudaiya-Nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṉeriṉmelkoṇṭāṉ tiripuvaṉaccak
karavartti kulacekaradevaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu peṇṇai
vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi nāṭu caṇpaiyāṉa virarācen
tiracoḻapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāntoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiya nā
yaṉārkku kulacekaraṉ cantikku veñcaṉattukkum peṇṇait teṉkarai meykuṉṟa
nāṭṭu naraḷokatiraṉpaṭṭu kiḻpāṟkellai ciṟṟāmur Ellaikku
meṟkku melpāṟkellai kaḷaviyappāṭi Ellaikku kiḻakkum te
ṉpāṟkellai kāvaṉūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum vaṭapāṟkellai peṇ
ṇai Āṟṟukku teṟkkum Uḷppaṭṭa nañcai nañcai muṉṟarai veliyuḷ paṭṭa puñcai nila mu[ ṉ
ṟu veliciṉṉa] mumāka Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭutteṉ koṉeriṉmel koṇṭāṉ kulacekarataveneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
